title: desmodium neomexicanum var. bigelovii
intro: Desmodium neomexicanum var. bigelovii, also known as Mexican tick clover, is a perennial legume native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic compounds. The health benefits of Desmodium neomexicanum var. bigelovii include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate skin irritations, and provide relief from various gastrointestinal issues. Desmodium neomexicanum var. bigelovii is often used in herbal preparations, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, to harness its medicinal properties for treating various ailments.
